title: Morning Market Brief — April 13, 2026
excerpt: Monday open dominated by Iran strike fears — oil surges +8%, futures well off lows but volatile. Tesla FSD launches in Netherlands. Karpathy drops viral thread on AI capability gap. NFLX earnings week. MU chart breaking out.

title: Evening Brief — Thursday, April 9, 2026
excerpt: Stocks close mixed with QQQ/SPY extending winning streaks (6 days straight). TXN +2.91% leads Adrian's watchlist. BTC at $72K, ETH $2.19K. Musk shows FSD driving LA. Karpathy on AI capability gaps. Fed officials on the speaking circuit tomorrow.

title: Evening Brief — Wednesday, April 8, 2026
excerpt: TSLA down 8 weeks straight per @Mr_Derivatives. QQQ/SPY 6-day green streaks (longest since mid-2025). Crypto consolidating: BTC $70.8K, ETH $2,183, SOL $82.15. Grok 4.20 claims 78% non-hallucination rate beating Claude/GPT. CPI Friday landmine looms.

title: Morning Market Brief — April 9, 2026
excerpt: TERAFAB project with Intel signing dominates AI news. Anthropic Mythos preview debuts in cybersecurity. Oil above $99/barrel on Iran ceasefire violations. Databricks co-founder says 'AGI is here already.' Fed March FOMC minutes released.
